author: Can Kockan
message:
Funcotator MANE transcript annotation logic changes (#9369)

* Change MANE transcript selection logic. If variant is covered by both MANE_SELECT and MANE_PLUS_CLINICAL, let Funcotator pick the best through BEST_EFFECT or CANONICAL

* Test different prioritization order for BEST_EFFECT

* Modify expected outputs of the unit tests to reflect changes made to the preferMANETranscripts option

* Change function name to better reflect what it now does

author: epiercehoffman
message: check bkpt dist for each cpx interval and overall in SVConcordance (#9324)

author: Miguel Covarrubias
message: Pin gcnvkernel dependency for Python 3.10, other build fixes [VS-1789] (#9313)

author: Miguel Covarrubias
message:
Silence CodeQL JavaScript / TypeScript errors [VS-1777] (#9304)

* CodeQL was enabled on all public Broad repositories.  Since this repository contains no JavaScript / TypeScript, CodeQL always fails.  Because of this we have to add a workaround here so it does not fail and our checks all come up nice and green.

author: Karan Jaisingh
message: Fix index outputs from PrintSVEvidence and CollectSVEvidence (#9269)

message: Add command line option to HaplotypeCaller for upweighting ALT-suppor… (#9234)

author: Chirayu Haryan
message:
Updated GKL version to 0.9.1 (#9220)

- Updated GKL dependency from v0.9.0 to v0.9.1 for a small but important bug fix for the Smith-Waterman implementation (moving a static global variable `D_MAX_SEQ_LEN` to an internal scope to avoid potential conflicts).

author: Vahid
message:
Adds a tool for converting a counts type file to a depth type file. (#9231)

* Draft a tool for converting a counts type file to a depth type file.

* Update expected integration test files.

* Improve argument definition & make sample label optional.

* Improve integration test.

* Update expected outputs of the integration test.

* Add tool & argument documentation, & clean up.

* Fix a typo.

* Fix a typo.

* Refactor variables & add tool documentation.

* Add the class attribute needed for doc generation.

author: Mark Walker
message: Improve handling of intersecting groups in SVStratify (#9185)

author: Can Kockan
message:
More fixes to MANE transcript selection mode (#9226)

* Check whether a variant is contained within at least one MANE transcript before returning the list of selected transcripts to avoid a "no_transcript" output

* Add MANE status comparator for transcript selection
